TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Maurice_Ager, title = Maurice_Ager, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maurice_Ager} }

S.FORM: == Maurice Ager == 2 bulad 9 demiad, 1984 a mihca, Maurice Ager, miunduay. Maurice Ager nalecuhan i Detroit, Michigan. Maurice Ager unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay. Maurice Ager i 2006 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 28, namapili' tu nu Dallas Mavericks putiput.
S.PHON: == mauri ¶…ô ag…ôr == * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, mauri ¶…ô ag…ôr, miunduaj. mauri ¶…ô ag…ôr nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i d…ôtroit, mi ¶ƒßigan. mauri ¶…ô ag…ôr unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u tabakiaj ajawaj mimar~…æiaj, u misimaw zikuzaj mimar~…æiaj. mauri ¶…ô ag…ôr i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu dar~…ær~…æas ma*…ôri ¶ks putiput.
S.FORM: == Maurice Ager == 2 bulad 9 demiad, 1984 a mihca, Maurice Ager, miunduay. Maurice Ager nalecuhan i Detroit, Michigan. Maurice Ager unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay. Maurice Ager i 2006 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 28, namapili' tu nu Dallas Mavericks putiput.
